body:
This also cleans up a number of assumptions that were made within the constructor.

Requesting review from @tomchor who I believe touched this last.
title: Expose `tridiagonal_direction` as kwarg for `FourierTridiagonalPoissonSolver`

body:
At the moment, Lagrangian Smagorinsky does not work for 2D flows because nodes on flat topologies return `nothing`. 
It is a very easy correction to make it work.

However, I know that Lagrangian Smagorinsky is not really meant for 2D flows, so if we want to keep this incompatibility to prevent people from using it, it is also fine (I vote for correcting it anyways).

@tomchor please advise
title: Lagrangian Smagorinsky for 2D flows

body:
Quality of life improvement. Now users can get viscosity and diffusivity of a model simply as

```julia
ν = viscosity(model)
κ = diffusivity(model, Val(:b))
```
instead of having to pass `model.diffusivity_fields` and `model.closure` as separate arguments.
title: Adds `viscosity(model)` method and similarly for `diffusivity`
